message:
test(integration): Add daemon integration tests with synthetic deltas

Add comprehensive integration tests that validate the full observation
pipeline without requiring WezTerm. Tests use synthetic pane and delta
models to exercise ingest, persistence, pattern detection, and event
recording.

Test characteristics:
- Deterministic: No system time dependencies, explicit timestamps
- Isolated: Each test uses temp database
- Fast: No network, no actual terminal emulator

Test coverage:
- segments_are_persisted: Basic ingest to storage flow
- seq_monotonicity_across_persists: Sequence number ordering
- gaps_are_recorded_for_gap_segments: Gap segment handling
- pattern_detection_triggers_events: Detection to event pipeline
- no_match_content_produces_no_events: Quick-reject path
- explicit_gap_discontinuity_is_recorded: Deliberate gap creation
- osc_133_prompt_markers_handled: Shell integration marker preservation
- multiple_panes_isolation: Cross-pane segment isolation
- claude_code_compaction_detection: Claude Code pattern matching
- alt_screen_content_as_gap: Alt-screen transition handling
- full_pipeline_mixed_content: End-to-end mixed workload
- sequence_discontinuity_gap: Out-of-sync cursor recovery
- large_content_batch: 100 segment volume test
- events_reference_segments: Foreign key integrity validation

Helper functions for creating synthetic PaneRecord, CapturedSegment
(delta and gap variants), and StoredEvent from Detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
